entries.summary: Fullstack migration Phase 01-03 complete: Supabase setup, DB schema, Auth UI
project_changes: Created Supabase client utilities (server, browser, middleware)
Created DB schema: profiles, folders, articles with RLS + trigger
Created login page with Google OAuth sign-in
Updated Navbar with user avatar + logout
Updated layout to fetch user profile
Added Google avatar domain to next.config
Added login + navbar user CSS styles
Removed old static knowledge base plan folder
commits: 06f0fc9 feat: Phase 01 - Supabase setup + auth foundation
decisions: Supabase All-in-One (Auth + DB + RLS) for simplicity
Drizzle ORM with postgres driver (PgBouncer compatible)
Hard delete + confirmation dialog (no soft delete)
Per-user data isolation via RLS policies
Next.js middleware for session refresh (deprecated but still working in 16.2)
open_questions: Next.js 16 deprecates middleware → proxy. May need to migrate naming later.
Supabase free tier DB pauses after 1 week inactive — consider cron ping for production

entries.summary: 🎉 Fullstack migration COMPLETE — Phase 04-07: Data layer → Folder CRUD → Article CRUD + Editor → Dashboard polish + Onboarding
project_changes: Phase 04: Extracted markdown.ts (pure functions), created DB queries (folders.ts, articles.ts), migrated all pages to Supabase, deleted knowledge.ts + docs/knowledge/
Phase 05: Folder CRUD — createFolder/renameFolder/deleteFolder server actions, FolderDialog (create/rename), DeleteConfirmDialog, sidebar hover actions

Phase 06: Article CRUD — createArticle/updateArticle/deleteArticle server actions, ArticleEditor with @uiw/react-md-editor split-pane, editor page, ArticleActions (edit/delete), Vietnamese slug generator
Phase 07: Demo data seeder (Getting Started folder + 2 articles), seed on first login, empty states (dashboard, folder, sidebar, knowledge page), dashboard CTA button
Fixed React 19 cascading setState error in FolderDialog (removed useEffect, use conditional rendering)
Fixed Supabase foreign key join type error (query folder slug separately)
Added shared UI types (src/lib/types.ts) to decouple components from data layer
commits: 1388541 chore: save brain + migration plan (Phase 01-03 complete)
fa62caa feat: Phase 04-07 — Data layer migration, Folder/Article CRUD, Editor, Dashboard polish
decisions: @uiw/react-md-editor for markdown editing (split-pane, dark theme, live preview)
Server actions for CRUD (not API routes) — simpler, type-safe
Vietnamese slug generator with NFD normalization + đ/Đ handling
Conditional rendering for dialogs (not isOpen prop) to avoid React 19 setState-in-effect error
Separate folder slug query instead of Supabase foreign key join (type compatibility)
Non-blocking seed in auth callback (catch errors silently)
revalidatePath('/', 'layout') for full sidebar refresh after mutations
next_steps: Test full CRUD flow: login → see demo data → create folder → create article → edit → delete
Consider: image upload, article export, mobile responsive polish
open_questions: Next.js 16 middleware → proxy deprecation warning (still works, future migration needed)
Supabase free tier DB pauses after 1 week inactive
Lockfile swc patching warning on build (cosmetic, doesn't affect output)
